name: azure-imagegen
description: Azure OpenAI v1 image generation and editing plugin for Codex with a bundled Python CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Azure OpenAI image workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Generate, edit, and batch-create images with Azure OpenAI v1 deployments through a packaged Codex skill and bundled Python CLI.
defaultPrompt: Dry-run a product image prompt with Azure ImageGen.
Edit an image background with an Azure deployment.
Batch-generate assets from a JSONL prompt file.
